business.name: Alabama Plumbing Company
business.tagline: Honest work, fair prices, done right

hero.headline: When your plumber shows up *same day* — that's Justin
hero.subheadline: Water heater died? Toilet flange cracked? We answer fast, quote fair, and finish the job right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every fixture, every problem
services_section.subheading: From quick repairs to full replacements — we handle what breaks

services.title: Toilet Repairs & Replacement
services.description: Flange repairs, new installs, supply valve replacements. Get your bathroom back to working order fast.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Same-day replacement when yours quits. Professional installation at prices that won't shock you.

services.title: Drain & Sink Repairs
services.description: Stoppers, supply lines, new sink installations. We fix what flows and what doesn't.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: When pipes burst or drains back up, we get there fast. Available when you need us most.

about.heading: Justin builds trust one job at a time
about.body: Alabama Plumbing Company serves Huntsville with honest work and straightforward pricing. When your plumbing breaks, we show up ready to fix it right. No runaround, no inflated quotes — just dependable service from someone your neighbors already recommend.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Huntsville says about our work

reviews.name: Jim S.
reviews.text: Justin handled everything perfectly — toilet flange, new toilet install, supply valve, and drain work. Great communication and fair prices throughout.

reviews.name: Kim W.
reviews.text: Multiple jobs completed and Justin has been exceptional every single time. We'll definitely call him again.

reviews.name: Edwin E.
reviews.text: Got me worked into his schedule in under 24 hours. Professional, confident work and a pleasure to work with.

reviews.name: Brenda W.
reviews.text: Our original water heater guy kept postponing, so we found Justin. Same day service and excellent work at a very reasonable price.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Need a plumber who answers the phone?
cta.body: Same-day service, honest quotes, and work that lasts. Call Justin at Alabama Plumbing Company — your neighbors already do.
